steps.title: Identify the grammatical structures around the blank
steps.content: The left side is a singular noun phrase (the subject: Iceland's 4,089-word constitution), with a parenthetical phrase interrupting between subject and verb. The right side is a prepositional phrase.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content:
A singular subject requires a singular verb (subject-verb agreement). ranks (choice D) is the only singular verb form and matches the subject.

The other choices are all plural verb forms and violate agreement with the singular subject.

That confirms D is correct.
